win_condition: After round 8, add all points; highest total wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied player with more resources (adventurers + coins) wins.

categories.label: Completed Quest Points
categories.description: VP printed on completed quest cards.

categories.label: Lord Bonus
categories.description: Endgame bonus points from secret Lord objective.

categories.label: Endgame Intrigue Cards
categories.description: Any VP from played or revealed endgame intrigue effects.

categories.label: Remaining Resources
categories.description: Convert remaining coins/adventurers to VP if a card effect allows or for tie reference.
